agentsExecuted.prompt: Map af-be-ddd-tests structure and identify skill patterns
agentsExecuted.notes: Explored skill directory structures, identified patterns, documented output organization

agentsExecuted.prompt: Research Gherkin/BDD format and DDD example structures
agentsExecuted.notes: Researched Gherkin language, DDD worked examples, BDD/JUnit 5 comparison

agentsExecuted.prompt: Design implementation approach for Gherkin BDD refactor
agentsExecuted.notes: Created comprehensive implementation plan with 7 sections, templates, and verification strategy

actions.notes: Updated description, purpose, input, output, process, dependencies, quality gates. Bumped version to 2.0.0
Created canonical Gherkin feature file template with Feature, Background, Scenario, Scenario Outline examples
Created comprehensive Gherkin specification summary template with traceability, coverage, implementation guidance
Documented turn objective, scope, key decisions, outputs, and success criteria
Recorded execution trace with agents used, actions taken, and completion status

decisions.title: Generate Gherkin feature files exclusively (not JUnit 5)
decisions.rationale: Cleaner scope, avoids duplication. Step definitions become separate downstream concern.
decisions.impacts: Reduces skill complexity, improves focus on BDD specification

decisions.title: One feature file per aggregate/bounded context
decisions.rationale: Aligns with DDD domain boundaries. Easier to maintain. Clear separation of concerns.
decisions.impacts: Improves discoverability and maintainability of feature files

decisions.title: Feature files organized in src/test/features/, gherkin-spec in .appfactory/specs/
decisions.rationale: Aligns with AppFactory conventions and Java project structure.
decisions.impacts: Clear separation of specification (specs/) from test code (features/)

artifacts.change_summary: Refactored from JUnit 5 test code generation to Gherkin BDD feature file generation

artifacts.content: Gherkin feature file template with Feature, Background, Scenario, Scenario Outline examples
artifacts.purpose: Canonical template for generating .feature files from DDD worked examples

artifacts.content: Comprehensive Gherkin specification summary with coverage analysis and implementation guidance

checks: ✓ Process steps updated (group by aggregate, generate features)
✓ Quality gates updated (Gherkin syntax, scenario structure)

notes: Planning phase identified need for user clarification on output format and file organization
User chose: Gherkin ONLY (not JUnit 5) + One feature per aggregate
Templates follow established AppFactory conventions (feature-template.gherkin, gherkin-spec-template.md)
SKILL.md refactor includes backward compatibility note about version 2.0.0 (breaking change from v1.0.0)
Future turns should implement parsing scripts (Python/Bash) to extract DDD examples and generate feature files
Quality gates updated to focus on Gherkin syntax, scenario completeness, and readability
next_turn_focus: Implement Python scripts for DDD parsing and Gherkin feature file generation
